index.heroDesc: 足式机器人资源整合仓库：面向 ROBOCON 备赛、科研学习与开发检索，汇总规则文档、技术分享、论文学习清单与推荐网络项目等核心资料。
index.heroBannerAlt: LocoWiki 足式机器人资源整合仓库

stats.modulesLabel: 规则、分享、论文、开源项目
stats.docsLabel: 仓库 Markdown 与 Wiki 同步统一阅读
stats.workflowLabel: 首页入口、内容页、文档页各自独立

flow.step1: 先看总览与仓库入口，明确资料边界。
flow.step2: 按比赛规则、技术分享、论文清单、开源项目四层分区进入。
flow.step3: 飞书内容统一回收到文档流中，不再依赖不稳定内嵌。

index.modulesDesc: 快速进入规则、分享、论文学习清单与网络开源项目。

modules.rulesDesc: 历届 ROBOCON 仿生足式机器人挑战赛（机器马术赛）官方规则 PDF 与修订版。
modules.sharingDesc: 高校队伍复盘与方案交流（PPT/PPTX），适合备赛与工程实践快速检索。
modules.paperTitle: 📄 论文学习清单（含推荐论文 PDF）
modules.paperDesc: 统一入口：按技术方向索引论文，并关联可公开获取的本地 PDF 与维护说明。
modules.networkDesc: 汇总实物开源与开发框架项目，覆盖 GitHub / Gitee / OSHWHub 等平台。

index.pathwaysTitle: 入口已经按用途重新分层
index.pathwaysDesc: 首页只负责导航，内容页负责概览，文档页负责持续阅读与目录切换。

pathways.docsDesc: 以 Markdown 渲染为主，左侧是知识地图，右侧是当前页目录。
pathways.wikiDesc: 飞书内容统一映射到仓库文档，不再依赖高风险内嵌。
pathways.downloadDesc: ZIP、Clone、Releases 和按模块下载入口集中到一个页面。
pathways.communityDesc: 贡献者、Issue、交流群和仓库维护入口合并到关于页统一呈现。

index.toolsDesc: 常用的机器人仿真、动力学与开发工具官网入口（新标签页打开）。

tools.mujocoDesc: 高性能物理引擎（DeepMind），常用于接触动力学仿真与强化学习。
tools.webotsDesc: 通用机器人仿真器（Cyberbotics），支持多传感器与 ROS 集成。
tools.gazeboDesc: ROS 生态常用仿真平台，适合传感器仿真与大规模场景。
tools.isaacDesc: NVIDIA Omniverse 仿真平台，支持高保真传感器、合成数据与训练流程。
tools.ros2Desc: ROS 2 官方文档入口（安装、教程与 API 参考）。
tools.moveitDesc: 机器人运动规划框架（ROS），涵盖规划、控制与可视化工具链。
tools.drakeDesc: MIT Robotics 工具链：动力学、控制、轨迹优化与系统建模。
tools.pinocchioDesc: 刚体动力学/雅可比/碰撞等核心组件，常用于控制与优化。
tools.pybulletDesc: Bullet 物理引擎的 Python 接口，适合快速搭建接触仿真与原型验证。

links.feishuDesc: 飞书内容已同步到仓库文档，可在站内按 Markdown 结构继续阅读。
links.contributorsDesc: 在关于页查看 LocoWiki 项目贡献者列表与贡献统计。
links.qqDesc: 点击链接加入群聊【Robo-LocoWiki运控交流群】。
links.feedbackDesc: 欢迎提交 Issue / PR，补充资料外链、更新论文学习清单、维护网络开源项目索引。

about.heading: 关于本站
about.introSuffix: 资源仓库的静态站点，使用 GitHub Pages（github.io）托管。

highlights.layersDesc: 首页、内容页、文档页分别处理导航、说明和持续阅读。
highlights.flowDesc: 资料入口最终都回收到仓库 Markdown 与 Wiki 文档流里。
highlights.sourceDesc: 页面展示层和资料源拆开，前端重构不会改变仓库内容组织。

about.architectureDesc: 不是简单换皮，而是把导航入口、文档阅读流和维护入口从旧壳体里拆开。

architecture.homeDesc: 首页只保留入口组织和阅读路径，不再承载文档壳和飞书历史残留。
architecture.docsDesc: 文档页负责 Markdown 渲染、左侧知识地图、右侧页内目录与移动端导航切换。
architecture.downloadsDesc: 下载方式集中到单页，区分 ZIP、Clone、Releases 和按模块获取，不再散落在多个说明段里。
architecture.collaborationDesc: 贡献者、Issue、社群和仓库维护入口合并到关于页，避免文档阅读与项目协作互相干扰。

about.designItem1: 首页：按模块快速入口（规则 / 分享 / 论文学习清单 / 推荐网络项目）。
about.designItem2: 文档页：通过浏览器实时拉取源仓库的 Markdown 并渲染成文档风格页面。
about.designItem3: 下载页：提供整仓 ZIP、克隆命令、以及按模块获取的入口。
about.designItem4: 飞书知识库：将飞书内容同步到源仓库后，站内按 Markdown 文档结构直接浏览。
about.principlesDesc: 页面样式可以继续迭代，但信息职责、内容来源和阅读路径必须先稳定下来。

principles.docsFirstDesc: 所有资料入口最终都应落到可持续维护的 Markdown 文档流，而不是只停在页面组件里。
principles.syncedDesc: 飞书只是一个上游来源，站内阅读不再依赖第三方内嵌是否稳定。
principles.maintainableDesc: 配置、文案和页面壳分离，让后续继续改样式或扩页面时不需要重写数据层。

about.copyrightBody: 本站仅做“索引与展示”。仓库中收录的 PDF/PPT/外链等资料，其版权与署名权归原作者/原发布方所有。 如有侵权或不当公开，请在源仓库提交 Issue 以便及时处理。
about.faqDesc: 当前最容易遇到的问题主要来自网络访问、下载方式和旧飞书内嵌路径的历史兼容。
about.faqDocA: 文档页需要访问 raw.githubusercontent.com。若网络受限，请直接打开 GitHub 页面或使用镜像/代理。
about.faqDownloadA: 优先使用 git clone（或国内镜像），大文件建议启用 Git LFS。
about.faqWikiQ: 为什么不再强调飞书内嵌？
about.faqWikiA: 因为第三方内嵌受登录态、跨域策略和浏览器限制影响太大，现在统一以同步后的仓库文档作为站内阅读入口。
about.ctaDesc: 如果你已经理解站点结构，下一步应该直接从文档流阅读，而不是在说明页里来回跳。

downloads.heading: 资源下载与获取
downloads.introPrefix: 本站不重复存储资源文件；所有 PDF / PPT / 脚本均来源于
downloads.introSuffix: 。你可以按需：整仓下载、克隆、或在文档页直接点文件名下载。

highlights.zipDesc: 适合快速浏览和离线查阅，不需要 Git 环境。
highlights.cloneDesc: 适合长期维护、增量拉取和参与贡献。
highlights.docsDesc: 大部分资源都能先在文档页定位，再决定下载或跳仓库。

downloads.quickDesc: 先决定你是要快速浏览、长期同步，还是只下载某个模块。
downloads.modulesDesc: 如果你只想拿某一类资料，直接从文档入口分区进入更快。

modules.paperHub: 论文学习清单（索引 + 推荐论文 PDF）
modules.network: 推荐网络项目（实物开源 + 框架开源）

moduleCards.rulesDesc: 比赛规则页会集中列出规则 PDF、版本差异和相关说明。
moduleCards.sharingDesc: 适合直接按队伍和主题查找分享资料，再决定是否下载原文件。
moduleCards.paperDesc: 先看索引，再按需要跳转本地 PDF 或公开论文来源。
moduleCards.networkDesc: 更多是项目入口与链接整理，适合二次筛选而不是整包下载。
moduleCards.scriptsDesc: 如果你在本地维护镜像或同步 Wiki，先看脚本说明再执行。

downloads.workflowDesc: 如果你不是一次性下载，而是准备持续跟仓库同步，建议按这个顺序处理。

workflow.cloneDesc: 把完整目录结构拉到本地，后续更新时只需要增量拉取。
workflow.refreshDesc: 需要同步 Wiki 或批量抓取资料时，再进入脚本和自动化说明。
workflow.browseDesc: 文档页负责检索和目录跳转，仓库目录负责原始文件管理，两者不要混用。

downloads.policyDesc: 下载策略要区分“仓库原始文件”“公开可抓取内容”和“超大文件管理”三种情况。

policy.mirrorDesc: 论文和外部资源优先保留索引与合法来源；真正需要批量抓取时，再在本地执行脚本。

downloads.paperFetchTitle: 论文 PDF 批量抓取（可公开获取）
downloads.paperFetchDesc: 如果你在本地维护仓库，推荐用脚本批量下载（优先 arXiv / OpenReview 等开源来源）：
downloads.largeFileDesc: 单文件超过约 100MB 时建议使用 Git LFS（或替换为合规外链）。若你发现下载速度慢，优先使用 git clone 或镜像。

dynamic.zipDesc: 适合快速浏览与离线查阅（不包含 Git 历史）。
dynamic.cloneDesc: 适合持续更新与贡献；推荐配合 Git LFS（若存在大文件）。
dynamic.cloneCommandNote: 如果你要长期跟仓库同步，这个方式最稳。
dynamic.releasesDesc: 如果后续提供打包资源（模型/数据/场地等），会优先放到 Releases。
dynamic.repoDesc: 查看目录结构、历史提交、Issue/PR、以及最完整的更新说明。
dynamic.renderError: 生成下载入口失败，请稍后重试。

docs.tableScrollHint: 表格较宽，可左右滚动查看更多列
docs.tipPath: 检查文件路径是否存在
docs.tipGitHub: 直接在 GitHub 上查看：

contributors.heading: 贡献者
contributors.introSuffix: 提交代码、文档和建议的伙伴。此页面会读取 GitHub Contributors 数据并展示贡献者列表。

highlights.apiDesc: 贡献者列表直接读取仓库 contributors 数据，不额外维护前端静态名单。
highlights.liveDesc: 页面会在加载时重新读取贡献次数和贡献者数量，而不是写死在页面里。
highlights.entryDesc: 不只是代码提交，资料补充、链接修复和反馈整理都算有效参与。

contributors.overviewDesc: 这里展示的是仓库级贡献者数据，用来帮助你快速识别当前维护者和活跃贡献情况。
contributors.listHint: 按贡献次数排序展示，点击卡片可跳转到对应 GitHub 主页。
contributors.guideDesc: 如果你要继续参与，不一定非得先改代码；整理资料和指出结构问题同样重要。

guide.issueDesc: 当你发现失效链接、资料归类问题、页面结构缺陷或同步异常时，优先提 Issue。
guide.prDesc: 如果你已经修好文档、脚本或页面内容，可以直接提交 Pull Request 合并更改。
guide.communityDesc: 对资料征集、比赛规则、论文整理和维护计划有想法时，可以先在交流群里对齐。

contributors.ctaDesc: 如果你已经在使用这些资料，最有价值的下一步就是把新资料、勘误和链接整理再回灌进仓库。
contributors.cardAria: 查看 {login} 的 GitHub 主页
contributors.errorListTop: 当前无法读取 GitHub API。
contributors.apiFormatError: GitHub API 返回数据格式异常

feishu.heading: 飞书知识库
feishu.intro: 本页用于站内查看飞书知识库。若浏览器策略阻止内嵌（常见于第三方 Cookie / 跨域限制），请直接使用“新标签打开”。
feishu.maintDesc: 面向开发者的同步接入说明已迁移到仓库 docs/ 目录，前台页面仅保留用户阅读与状态展示。
feishu.statusDefaultMessage: 状态面板仅展示最近一次同步记录。
feishu.statusNotConfiguredDetail: 如需启用自动同步，请查看仓库 docs/feishu-sync.md。
feishu.noticeLoading: 正在尝试加载飞书知识库…
feishu.noticeEmbedTimeout: 内嵌加载超时。请点击上方按钮在新标签页打开飞书知识库。
feishu.noticeEmbedLoaded: 知识库页面已加载。如果看到登录页或空白，请改用新标签页打开。
feishu.noticeEmbedBlocked: 当前浏览器阻止了内嵌加载，请点击上方按钮打开原页面。
feishu.noticeInitFailed: 飞书知识库页面初始化失败，请稍后重试。

notFound.heading: 页面不存在（404）
notFound.desc: 你访问的页面不存在或已被移动。

index.heroDesc: A legged-robot resource hub for ROBOCON preparation, research learning, and development lookup, covering competition rules, technical sharing, paper study hub, and web open-source projects.

stats.modulesLabel: Rules, sharing, papers, and open-source projects
stats.docsLabel: Repository Markdown and synced wiki share one reading flow
stats.workflowLabel: Landing, content pages, and docs pages now have separate roles

flow.step1: Start from the overview and repository entry to understand the content boundary.
flow.step2: Then enter through rules, technical sharing, paper hub, and open-source projects.
flow.step3: Feishu content is routed back into the docs flow instead of relying on unstable embeds.

index.modulesDesc: Quick access to rules, sharing, paper study hub, and web open-source projects.

modules.rulesDesc: Official PDF rulebooks and revisions of past ROBOCON bionic legged robot challenge seasons.
modules.sharingDesc: Post-match reviews and technical sharing from university teams (PPT/PPTX), ideal for competition prep and engineering lookup.
modules.paperDesc: Unified entry: browse papers by technical direction, with links to open-access local PDFs and maintenance notes.
modules.networkDesc: Collection of hardware and framework open-source projects across GitHub / Gitee / OSHWHub and more.

index.pathwaysTitle: Entries are separated by purpose now
index.pathwaysDesc: The homepage navigates, content pages summarize, and the docs page handles deep reading and directory switching.

pathways.docsDesc: Markdown-first reading with a knowledge map on the left and page outline on the right.
pathways.wikiDesc: Feishu content is mapped into repository docs instead of depending on high-risk embeds.
pathways.downloadDesc: ZIP, clone, releases, and module-based downloads now live in one place.
pathways.communityDesc: Contributors, issues, chat groups, and maintenance entry points are now grouped under the About page.

index.toolsDesc: Official entries for commonly used simulation, dynamics, and robotics development tools (opens in a new tab).

tools.mujocoDesc: High-performance physics engine (DeepMind), widely used for contact dynamics simulation and reinforcement learning.
tools.webotsDesc: General-purpose robot simulator (Cyberbotics) with multi-sensor support and ROS integration.
tools.gazeboDesc: A commonly used simulator in the ROS ecosystem, suitable for sensor simulation and large-scale scenes.
tools.isaacDesc: NVIDIA Omniverse simulator with high-fidelity sensors, synthetic data, and training workflows.
tools.ros2Desc: ROS 2 official documentation portal (installation, tutorials, and API reference).
tools.moveitDesc: Robot motion planning framework for ROS, covering planning, control, and visualization toolchains.
tools.drakeDesc: MIT Robotics toolkit for dynamics, control, trajectory optimization, and system modeling.
tools.pinocchioDesc: Core components for rigid-body dynamics, Jacobians, and collisions, commonly used in control and optimization.
tools.pybulletDesc: Python interface to the Bullet physics engine for quickly building contact simulation and prototypes.

links.feishuDesc: Feishu content is synced into repository docs and stays readable inside the site as Markdown.
links.contributorsDesc: View the LocoWiki contributor list and contribution stats from the About page.
links.qqDesc: Join the discussion group: Robo-LocoWiki Motion Control Community.
links.feedbackDesc: Submit Issues/PRs to add external resources, update the paper study hub, and maintain the open-source project index.

about.heading: About This Site
about.introPrefix: This is a static site for showcasing the
about.introSuffix: resource repository, hosted on GitHub Pages (github.io).

highlights.layersDesc: Landing, content pages, and docs pages handle navigation, context, and long-form reading separately.
highlights.flowDesc: Every resource entry eventually routes back into repository Markdown and wiki docs.
highlights.sourceDesc: The presentation layer is separated from the repository content, so frontend refactors do not rewrite the source structure.

about.architectureDesc: This is not just a visual refresh. It separates navigation entry points, deep reading flow, and maintenance actions from the old mixed shell.

architecture.homeDesc: The homepage now focuses on entry organization and reading paths instead of carrying the old docs shell and wiki remnants.
architecture.docsDesc: The docs page is responsible for Markdown rendering, left-side knowledge map, right-side page outline, and mobile navigation switching.
architecture.downloadsDesc: Download methods are grouped into one page with clear separation between ZIP, clone, releases, and module-based access.
architecture.collaborationDesc: Contributors, issues, community links, and maintenance actions are now merged into the About page so they no longer interfere with reading.

about.designItem1: Homepage: quick module access (rules / sharing / paper study hub / web open-source projects).
about.designItem2: Docs page: fetches Markdown from the source repository in real time and renders it as documentation.
about.designItem3: Downloads page: provides ZIP download, clone command, and module-based access.
about.designItem4: Feishu Wiki: synced into the source repository and rendered directly as Markdown docs on the site.
about.principlesDesc: The visual system can keep evolving, but page responsibility, content source, and reading flow need to stay stable first.

principles.docsFirstDesc: Resource entry points should always land in maintainable Markdown docs instead of stopping at one-off page widgets.
principles.syncedDesc: Feishu is only an upstream source. In-site reading should not depend on whether a third-party embed is stable.
principles.maintainableDesc: Config, copy, and page shell are separated so later visual or structural changes do not require rewriting the data layer.

about.copyrightBody: This site serves as an index and presentation layer only. Copyright and attribution for PDFs/PPTs/external links belong to their original authors or publishers. If you find infringement or improper disclosure, please submit an issue in the source repository.
about.faqDesc: The most common problems now come from network access, download strategy, and old Feishu embed compatibility.
about.faqDocA: The docs page needs access to raw.githubusercontent.com. If your network is restricted, open GitHub directly or use a mirror/proxy.
about.faqDownloadA: Prefer git clone (or a local mirror). For large files, enable Git LFS.
about.faqWikiA: Because third-party embeds are too dependent on login state, cross-origin policy, and browser restrictions. Synced repository docs are now the stable in-site reading entry.
about.ctaDesc: Once you understand the site structure, the next step should be reading through the docs flow instead of bouncing around explanation pages.

downloads.heading: Resource Download & Access
downloads.introPrefix: This site does not duplicate resource files; all PDFs / PPTs / scripts come from the
downloads.introSuffix: . You can choose full-repo download, clone, or direct file download from docs pages.

highlights.zipDesc: Best for quick browsing and offline reading without setting up Git.
highlights.cloneDesc: Best for long-term maintenance, pulling updates, and contributing back.
highlights.docsDesc: Most resources can be located from the docs page first, then downloaded only when needed.

downloads.quickDesc: Choose first whether you want quick browsing, long-term sync, or only one module.
downloads.modulesDesc: If you only need one collection, entering from the docs section is usually faster than pulling the full repository.

moduleCards.rulesDesc: The rules section concentrates PDFs, version differences, and related notes in one place.
moduleCards.sharingDesc: Best for finding sharing slides by team or topic before deciding whether to download raw files.
moduleCards.paperDesc: Start from the index, then jump into local PDFs or open-access paper sources as needed.
moduleCards.networkDesc: This section is more about project discovery and external links than full-package download.
moduleCards.scriptsDesc: If you maintain a local mirror or wiki sync flow, read the script docs before running anything.

downloads.workflowDesc: If this is more than a one-time download and you plan to stay in sync with the repository, follow this order.

workflow.cloneDesc: Pull the full directory structure locally so later updates become incremental fetches.
workflow.refreshDesc: Only enter automation and sync tooling when you actually need wiki sync or batch fetching.
workflow.browseDesc: The docs page is for navigation and lookup, while the repo tree is for raw file management. Do not treat them as the same layer.

downloads.policyDesc: Download strategy should distinguish between raw repository assets, open-access content, and oversized file handling.

policy.mirrorDesc: For papers and external resources, keep indexes and legal sources first. Run local fetch scripts only when you actually need a local copy.

downloads.paperFetchDesc: If you maintain a local clone, use this script to batch download papers (prefer arXiv / OpenReview open sources):
downloads.largeFileDesc: For files larger than ~100MB, use Git LFS (or compliant external links). If downloads are slow, prefer git clone or a mirror.

dynamic.zipDesc: Best for quick browsing and offline reading (without Git history).
dynamic.cloneDesc: Best for continuous updates and contributions; Git LFS is recommended when large files exist.
dynamic.cloneCommandNote: This is the stable option if you plan to keep syncing with the repository.
dynamic.releasesDesc: If packaged resources are provided later (models/data/fields), they will be published in Releases first.
dynamic.repoDesc: Browse folder structure, commit history, issues/PRs, and complete updates.
dynamic.renderError: Failed to generate download entries. Please try again later.

docs.tableScrollHint: This table is wide. Scroll horizontally to view all columns.
docs.cannotFetch: Unable to fetch from source repository
docs.tipPath: Verify that the file path exists

contributors.heading: Contributors
contributors.introPrefix: Thanks to everyone who contributed code, documentation, and suggestions to
contributors.introSuffix: . This page reads GitHub Contributors data and shows the contributor list.

highlights.apiDesc: The contributor list is pulled directly from repository contributor data instead of maintaining a static frontend roster.
highlights.liveDesc: Counts and contributor rows are refreshed from GitHub when the page loads, not hardcoded into the page.
highlights.entryDesc: Valid participation is not only code commits. Resource curation, link fixes, and structured feedback also matter.

contributors.overviewDesc: This section shows repository-level contributor data so you can quickly identify current maintainers and active contributors.
contributors.listHint: Sorted by contribution count. Click a card to open the contributor's GitHub profile.
contributors.guideDesc: You do not need to start with code. Organizing resources and reporting structural problems are also useful contributions.

guide.issueDesc: If you find broken links, classification problems, page structure defects, or sync failures, start with an issue.
guide.prDesc: If you already fixed docs, scripts, or frontend content, submit a pull request directly.
guide.communityDesc: If you want to discuss resource collection, competition notes, paper curation, or maintenance plans, align in the chat group first.

contributors.ctaDesc: If you already rely on these materials, the most valuable next step is feeding back new resources, corrections, and organized links into the repository.
contributors.errorListTop: Unable to read the GitHub API right now.

feishu.heading: Feishu Wiki
feishu.intro: This page embeds the Feishu knowledge base. If browser policy blocks embedded view (often due to third-party cookies or cross-origin restrictions), use "Open in New Tab".
feishu.maintDesc: Developer-oriented sync integration docs were moved to the repository docs/ directory. The frontend page keeps only user-facing reading and status display.
feishu.statusDefaultMessage: The status panel only shows the latest sync record.
feishu.statusNotConfiguredDetail: To enable automatic sync, see docs/feishu-sync.md in the repository.
feishu.noticeEmbedTimeout: Embedded load timed out. Please use the button above to open Feishu Wiki in a new tab.
feishu.noticeEmbedLoaded: The wiki page has loaded. If you see a login page or blank page, please open it in a new tab.
feishu.noticeEmbedBlocked: Your browser blocked embedded loading. Please use the button above to open the original page.
feishu.noticeInitFailed: Failed to initialize the Feishu Wiki page. Please try again later.

notFound.heading: Page Not Found (404)
notFound.desc: The page you requested does not exist or has been moved.
